title: 1 Year Contract Technical Specialist UP$5000 (Degree in Nursing/ Open to Travel) #HCY
description:
Working hours: Office Hours + On Call Duties

Technical Specialist

The Technical Specialist (TS) provides essential technical and operational support to assigned Sales Specialists and territories, ensuring customer expectations are met before, during, and after orthopaedic surgical procedures. Reporting to the Technical Supervisor, the role requires close coordination with internal stakeholders including Sales, Customer Service, and Logistics (distribution, warehousing, and delivery). The TS is responsible for the management, readiness, and accountability of all instrumentation, implants, and workshop materials within the assigned territory.

Key Responsibilities

  • Provide technical support to surgeons and operating theatre staff during orthopaedic procedures.

  • Ensure all surgical instrumentation is complete, properly sterilised, and securely packed before and after surgery.

  • Develop and maintain in-depth knowledge of the company’s orthopaedic product portfolio and instrumentation to effectively support surgeons and nursing staff.

  • Support Sales personnel during product in-services for nurses and doctors, as well as participate in exhibitions and events on weekdays or weekends when required.

  • Maintain strict confidentiality of all company information, including pricing, product specifications, and internal documentation.

  • Assist Sales personnel with inventory management across all product portfolios.

  • Perform timely replenishment of consignment implants and ensure consignment sets are complete at all times.

  • Be available for mobilisation during on-call duties for assigned surgical cases.

  • Provide surgical support during weekends when required.

  • Ensure presence in the operating theatre at least 15 minutes prior to scheduled surgery.

  • Relay feedback, including complaints, competitive activity, and suggestions from surgeons and nurses, to Sales personnel.

  • Assist with cataloguing, documentation, and administrative tasks as required.

  • Support bi-annual stock-taking exercises to ensure inventory accuracy.



WA me at http://wa.me/+6598326219 or tele me at @sallytsin

For interested candidates, please send your most recent and updated resume to sallytsin@recruitexpress.com.sg


Tsin Chien Yee Sally
R25127272
Recruit Express Pte Ltd
EA License No. 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
